name: Text To Speech TTS – AtlasVoice
description: Convert any post, page, or WooCommerce product into natural-sounding audio. Free version uses browser SpeechSynthesis; Pro unlocks AtlasVoice AI engine, Google Cloud, OpenAI & ElevenLabs voices.
features: 81+ languages, 300+ AI voices (Pro)
No API required for free — instant browser-based TTS
WooCommerce product description audio
Customizable audio player with multiple designs
Shortcode & widget support for flexible placement
WPML, GTranslate & Polylang multilingual support
Custom Post Type & ACF field compatibility
Listening analytics & engagement tracking

name: 3D Model Viewer – AtlasAR
description: The most feature-rich free 3D viewer & AR plugin for WordPress and WooCommerce. Unlimited 3D model uploads, native iOS & Android AR — no app downloads needed.
features: Unlimited 3D model uploads (GLB, GLTF, USDZ)
Native iOS & Android AR — no app required
WooCommerce integration with per-variation 3D models
AI 3D model generation via Tripo3D API
QR code for desktop-to-mobile AR handoff
Gutenberg block, Elementor & all page builders
Dimensions, hotspots & product configurators (Pro)
Auto compression — reduce file size up to 70% (Pro)

name: AI Workflow Automation – AtlasAgent
description: The most complete AI integration plugin for WordPress. 80+ abilities, built-in MCP server for AI agent connectivity, AI experiments in Gutenberg, and full WooCommerce support.
features: 80+ abilities across 10 toggleable modules
Built-in MCP server — connect Claude, Cursor & AI agents
AI experiments in block editor (excerpts, images)
Multi-provider AI (OpenAI, Gemini, Claude)
Drag-and-drop workflow builder
JWT authentication & role-based access control
WooCommerce AI Store Manager (24 abilities)
External abilities — discover third-party plugin tools

name: Smart Local AI – AtlasAI
description: Browser-based AI that runs 100% on-device. Semantic related posts, Netflix-style personalized recommendations, and automatic alt text — zero API costs, fully GDPR compliant.
features: RelevantFlow — AI-powered semantic related posts
PersonaFlow — personalized recommendations (30 signals)
AltGenius — automatic image alt text generation
Zero cost — no API keys, no subscriptions, no limits
100% privacy — all AI runs in the visitor's browser
WooCommerce product recommendations
Works with any post type & custom post types
WebGPU + WASM hardware-accelerated inference
